_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the invalid-range-syntax (branch 2) of the excel-activities/delete-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (ArgumentException 'The range is invalid' from DeleteRangeX) → jobs logs (resolved Range expression 'A1:B' + lastRow.ToString() evaluated to 'A1:B0' with lastRow=0) → workflow source (Range is an expression dependent on dtCleanup.Rows.Count). The resolved-range Trace line + the expression in the XAML are the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0022222-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
